gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/405)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/405)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) أَقْرَأُ الْقُرْآنَ فِي الْحَمَّامِ وَ أَنْكِحُ قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ismail Bin Mihran, from Muhammad Bin Abu Hamza, from Ali Bin Yaqteen who said,
‘I said to Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, ‘Reciting the Quran in the bathhouse and the copulation?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem’.
en.sarwar: 30. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from Sama‘ah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘One who believes in Allah and in the Day of Judgment must not send his wife to a bathhouse.’”
